tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose metabolism or possible diabetes. Potassium is slightly high, which may warrant monitoring for renal or medication-related causes. Erythrocyte count and platelet distribution width are elevated, but other red cell and platelet indices are within normal limits. Mildly low CO₂ may indicate a tendency toward metabolic acidosis. Overall, most parameters are within normal range; recommend clinical correlation and follow-up for glycemic control and electrolyte status.

display.value: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
